title: phyllanthus oblanceolatus
intro: Phyllanthus oblanceolatus, also known as the slender leaf phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with viral infections. The health benefits of Phyllanthus oblanceolatus include its potential to support liver health, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In traditional herbal preparations, Phyllanthus oblanceolatus is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
